id.description: Artifact identifier. Must match the workflow step's output field value.

produced_by.description: Agent IDs that contributed to this artifact.

step_id.description: The workflow step ID that produced this artifact.

content_path.description: Path to the artifact's content file, relative to the session directory. Supports {{deliberation_dir}} template variable.

platform.description: Optional platform tag for social/content artifacts.

variation_index.description: 1-indexed variation number for multi-variation artifact runs.

channel_id.description: Reserved for html-live artifacts using bidirectional channels.

review_gate.description: The gate ID that reviewed this artifact. Null if no review gate.

revision.description: Revision number. Incremented each time the step is re-run via retry_with_feedback.
